svg.text: Laundry nook - corrected high cabinet elevation set - v4
The elevation below is drawn as a real 1040 mm nominal bay with cabinet widths and allowed trolley heights. Units are millimetres.
2) Nook elevation - high wall cabinet width comparison
Sideways + vertically stacked towers are the clean
layout. Front-facing towers work only if you accept
a much deeper trolley projecting into the laundry.
Option table - trolley heights permitted under each top cabinet
maximum trolley height; rack space tight
maximum trolley height; wider cable room
more rack capacity; less trolley height
Formulas: side clearance = (1040 - cabinet width)/2. Cart height = 2590 - top clearance - cabinet height - 50. Clear aisle = 1650 - cabinet depth.
Recommendation: B2/B3 top cabinet; trolley around 900-980W x 450-600D x 1350-1600H, even though the absolute height limits are higher.
Generated as a corrected focus artefact. Verify finished plasterboard, skirting/trim, cabinet SKU drawings, wall blocking/noggins and ventilation path before ordering.
